response.overview: Thomas, an amateur MMA fighter, is poised to turn pro with his mother Dorothy’s unwavering support. But immediately following a crucial victory, his world is shattered by a devastating tragedy. Plunged into deep mourning, Thomas finds his passion for fighting tested by grief. His new fight is to regain his focus and return to the cage, fighting to keep his dream alive without his main supporter by his side.
response.title: Keep on Truckin'
